_comment: SYNTHETIC TEST DATA — DO NOT USE IN PRODUCTION

findings.reason: Response schema includes 12 advisory fields; frontend destructures only id and title. ~50KB waste per listing request.
Sequential forEach with await creates 5 waterfall fetches. No batch endpoint exists. Promise.all or batch endpoint needed.

findings.evidence_excerpt: find_by_id(pkg_id) -- no index found in migration files for advisories.package_id
findings.reason: Migration file m20260101_000001_create_advisories.rs creates table but defines no index on package_id. WHERE filter on 120K rows triggers sequential scan.

Call chain verified at 3 levels deep. However, effective query count is 4 (not 8 as initially estimated) because enrichment_service uses batch loading for 2 of its 3 queries. Severity downgraded from Medium to Low.

findings.evidence_excerpt: find_also_related(package_metadata::Entity) -- no metadata fields in response struct
findings.reason: LEFT JOIN on package_metadata via find_also_related but response struct PackageListItem has no metadata fields. 3ms overhead per query on 45K row table.

findings.evidence_excerpt: offsetHeight read -> style.height write inside map() loop
findings.reason: DOM read (offsetHeight) followed by DOM write (style.height) inside packages.map() loop. Each iteration forces synchronous layout recalculation.
